title: Assignment Operators
description: Assign values and combine with arithmetic.

slides.title: Basic Assignment =
slides.content:
# The = Operator

The basic assignment operator is `=`. It assigns the value on the right to the variable on the left.

```php
<?php
$x = 5;    // $x now equals 5
$y = $x;   // $y now also equals 5
?>
```

Note: `=` is NOT equality; it's assignment.

slides.title: Combined Assignment Operators
slides.content:
# Shorthand Notations

Often you want to update a variable with an operation, like `$x = $x + 10`. PHP provides shortcuts:

*   `+=`  add and assign
*   `-=`  subtract and assign
*   `*=`  multiply and assign
*   `/=`  divide and assign
*   `%=`  modulus and assign
*   `**=` exponentiate and assign

These do the operation with the right operand and assign the result to the left variable.
